name: EdwBhiMbrCobCleanseCobLoad

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TMP_EdwBhiMbrCobCleanseCobLoad; SELECT B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, B.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, B.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, B.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, B.MBR_COB_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TMP_EdwBhiMbrCobCleanseCobLoad FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB A, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB B WHERE A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AND A.MBR_COB_TYP_CD = B.MBR_COB_TYP_CD AND A.MBR_COB_SK <> B.MBR_COB_SK AND A.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK <= B.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK AND A.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK >= B.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK; MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB AS T USING @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.TMP_EdwBhiMbrCobCleanseCobLoad AS S ON (T.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = S.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AND T.MBR_COB_TYP_CD = S.MBR_COB_TYP_CD AND T.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK = S.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK AND T.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK = S.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK AND T.MBR_COB_SK = S.MBR_COB_SK) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = S.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, T.MBR_COB_TYP_CD = S.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, T.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK = S.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, T.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK = S.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, T.MBR_COB_SK = S.MBR_COB_SK WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MBR_UNIQ_KEY, MBR_COB_TYP_CD, MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, MBR_COB_SK) VALUES (S.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, S.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, S.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, S.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, S.MBR_COB_SK);
